# Science & Technology

Scientific discoveries, technological launches, and digital developments from the year 2007.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Summary |
|---|---|
| [iPhone Launch](iphone-launch.md) | Apple CEO Steve Jobs introduced the original iPhone on January 9 at Macworld; the device went on sale June 29, combining phone, internet browser, and iPod in one touchscreen device and transforming the smartphone industry. |
| [Amazon Kindle Launch](amazon-kindle-launch.md) | Amazon introduced the first Kindle e-reader on November 19 at $399; it sold out in 5.5 hours, launched with 90,000 titles, and marked the start of the mass-market e-reader era. |
